initial_symptom: backend appeared to crash on hard reload or notification password save
journal_note: sudo journalctl blocked in agent shell (no TTY); operator must run: sudo journalctl -u setuphelfer-backend.service -n 300 --no-pager
root_cause: GET /api/system/status called synchronous _compute_system_status() from async handler; get_updates_categorized() ran apt list plus apt-get update and per-package apt-get upgrade -s, blocking the single uvicorn worker event loop so other API calls (notification GET/POST) timed out or appeared as backend crash. Secondary: parse_env_file could raise on non-UTF8 env file.
changes_summary: app.py: get_updates_categorized removed apt-get update and per-package apt-get upgrade -s; heuristic security category
package_activity.py: apt-get invocations with -s/--simulate/--dry-run treated as non-blocking
notification_settings.py: parse_env_file UTF-8 replace + no raise; build_public_settings defensive wrapper; write_failed message without exception text
app.py: try/except on notification GET/POST/test endpoints
tests extended for parse_env_file, save permission, apt simulate, package_activity
post_save_no_backend_crash: not re-tested against live POST with real password in agent session
hard_reload_no_backend_crash: mitigated by event-loop fix; full UI reload not re-run in agent session
system_status_single_request_latency_not: pre-fix production: first /api/system/status still running beyond 30s in curl probe; post-fix expected fast after deploy
deploy_note: Operator: copy modified backend files to /opt/setuphelfer/backend and sudo systemctl restart setuphelfer-backend.service
